_note: License / attribution / pinned-revision manifest for every accepted raw snapshot. Redistribution status is explicit; a source whose license forbids redistribution is corroboration-only and is NOT stored here. Checksums are computed deterministically from each raw file at ingest (see hash.ts); the update workflow reviews the catalog diff before a snapshot becomes a UX-v2 fixture.

sources.ingestionRisk: Repo advertises weekly Release snapshots but currently has NO Releases — pin runs/commits, never a Release; never depend on an undocumented dashboard DB endpoint.

sources.policy: A single result is a latency/accuracy-qualified validation anchor, not a full concurrency curve. Never label a submitter system as an AWS configuration.
Max-load throughput is a capacity ceiling, not an interactive-RAG result unless latency-qualified.

excludedFromAutomatedIngestion._note: Corroboration only — never scraped, never a runtime dependency.
sources: NVIDIA NIM web tables (no clear open feed)
